results.title: UALR offcially joins the United Athletic Conference
results.description: The University of Arkansas at Little Rock completed its formal transition into the United Athletic Conference with a celebration to mark the occasion Wednesday night at the Governor's Mansion in Little Rock.

results.title: Neighbors put out fence fire late Wednesday night
results.description: Neighbors with hoses put out a fence fire late Wednesday night in the 200 block of South Rancho Street. The fire, reported to Kern County Fire Department at 11:54 p.m., burned a section of fence and completely destroyed a trash...
